programme.title: Gran Bretagna
programme.desc: Riviviamo insieme tutte le forti emozioni che ci sono state trasmesse durante gli scorsi Gran Premi in attesa della gara di Formula 1.

programme.title: Reparto Corse F1
programme.desc: Davide Camicioli e Matteo Bobbi presentano e analizzano i week end di gara di Formula 1. I momenti principali, le parole dei protagonisti e le prospettive mondiali dei contendenti.

programme.title: GP Austria: Gara
programme.desc: Ottava gara del mondiale in casa della Red Bull. Antonelli guida la classifica con 41 punti su Hamilton e 50 su Russell. Telecronaca di Carlo Vanzini, Marc Gene' e Roberto Chinchero.

programme.title: Ep.2
programme.desc: Alle origini del nuovo talento italiano della F1: in questo episodio il percorso di Antonelli nella massima categoria. Gli alti e bassi dell'anno da rookie, prima della definitiva esplosione del 2026.

programme.title: Austria
programme.desc: Insieme agli ospiti in studio, analizziamo quanto accaduto durante il Gran Premio d'Austria, che ha regalato una vittoria fondamentale a George Russell e alla Mercedes, ma il risultato finale racconta solo una parte della storia.

programme.title: Gran Bretagna 2013 - F1

programme.desc: On Saturday Night Football, Premier League pacesetters Arsenal head west to face Fulham at Craven Cottage. The Cottagers took two points off the Gunners in this fixture last year. (18.10)

programme.title: PL: Spurs v Aston Villla Hlts
programme.desc: Super Sunday comes from the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium as Thomas Frank's Spurs host Unai Emery's Villa in the Premier League. Both teams come from 2-1 wins over promoted opposition. (19.10)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Man Utd Hlts
programme.desc: It's arch rivals Manchester United at Anfield for the Premier League champions Liverpool on Super Sunday. Arne Slot's Reds are looking to end a run of three successive defeats. (19.10)

programme.title: MNF: West Ham v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Rivals from the capital West Ham and Brentford meet in the Premier League on Monday Night Football. Nuno Espirito Santo is without a win in his first two games as Irons boss. (20.10)

programme.title: PL Stories: Diogo Jota
programme.desc: One year on from the tragic death of Diogo Jota and his brother André in a car accident, this deeply emotional PL Stories show celebrates the life of one of football's most loved figures.

programme.desc: Revisit the annals of Premier League history with the 2023-2024 season, a campaign that saw Manchester City go one step further, winning an unprecedented fourth-successive top-flight title.

programme.title: PL Retro: Chelsea v Liverpool 2003
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from years gone by in the Premier League. Here, Chelsea and Liverpool meet on the final day of the 2002-03 season, with a top-four place on the line.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/L'Pool '95
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Man United host Liverpool in October 1995, as Eric Cantona returned from his lengthy suspension in a thrilling 2-2 draw.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '97
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Liverpool meet Manchester United at Anfield in 1997, in a match that had a happy outcome for the Red Devils.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '01
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Liverpool meet Manchester United in 2001, as a Michael Owen brace guided the home side to victory.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/L'Pool '10
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Manchester United meet Liverpool in 2010, with a Dimitar Berbatov hat-trick proving the difference between the two teams.

programme.title: Best Premier League Goals 09/10
programme.desc: A look back over the best goals in recent seasons in the Premier League. Here, the 2009-10 season.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: Liverpool/Man Utd
programme.desc: A look at some of the best Premier League goals scored in matches between rivals Liverpool and Manchester United.

programme.title: Best PL Goals: Chelsea/Man Utd
programme.desc: Enjoy some of the best goals from past clashes between Chelsea and Manchester United in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Spurs/Chelsea 08
programme.desc: Relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Spurs and Chelsea go head-to-head at White Hart Lane in an end-to-end encounter that produced eight goals.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man Utd/Man City
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic action from the Premier League. Here, a memorable Manchester derby at Old Trafford back in the 2011-12 season that saw a six-goal Man City run rampant.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/Arsenal 01
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic action from the Premier League. Here, Manchester United versus Arsenal back in the 2000-01 season in a one-sided game that saw seven goals.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games: L'pool/Newc 96
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, rewind to the seven-goal thriller between Liverpool and Newcastle United at Anfield back in the 1995-96 season.

programme.title: Premier League Review

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: Off to a flying start in the post-Daniel Levy era, Tottenham make the trip to the South Coast for a Premier League clash with Brighton, who lost 2-1 away to Bournemouth previously. (20.09)

programme.title: PL: West Ham v C. Palace Hlts
programme.desc: Oliver Glasner - the first Palace manager to go 10 Premier League games unbeaten - takes his side to West Ham. The pressure is back on for Graham Potter after defeat to Spurs. (20.09)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: Beaten by Liverpool in the cruellest of circumstances, what can Scott Parker's Burnley draw from this Premier League encounter with Forest and their new boss Ange Postecoglou? (20.09)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: A crucial top-flight contest at Molineux, as bottom-of-the-pile Wolves - who have lost their first four matches in the Premier League - welcome Daniel Farke's Leeds United. (20.09)

programme.title: SNF: Man Utd v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: A Saturday Night Football doubleheader begins at Old Trafford with a blockbuster opener between Ruben Amorim's under-fire Manchester United and Enzo Maresca's unbeaten Chelsea. (20.09)

programme.title: SNF: Fulham v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Fulham host Brentford on Saturday Night Football at the Cottage. For the Bees, it's seven days removed since their last west-London derby which ended in a two-all draw with Chelsea. (20.09)

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Newcastle make the long trip to Bournemouth this Super Sunday with new forward Nick Woltemade in tow. The big German bagged the winner against Wolves on Premier League debut. (21.09)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: Unai Emery and Villa take to the Stadium of Light in search of a first Premier League win on Super Sunday. Regis Le Bris' impressive Sunderland have seven points to their name. (21.09)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Hot off last week's derby win, Pep Guardiola's City travel to London for a Super Sunday contest against Arsenal. The Gunners return to the Emirates after a 2-0 win in Bilbao midweek. (21.09

programme.title: PL: Leeds v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: Daniel Farke's Leeds eye a third Premier League win of the campaign with Bournemouth's visit to Elland Road. Since losing on opening day, the Cherries have won three and drawn once. (27.09)

programme.title: PL: Man City v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: Bringing a point home from the Emirates, Manchester City host Scott Parker's Burnley next in the Premier League. The Clarets picked up a useful point last weekend against Forest. (27.09)

programme.title: PL: C. Palace v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: With a trip to Istanbul ahead, Arne Slot's Liverpool venture to Selhurst Park first for a Premier League clash with Oliver Glasner's rock-solid Palace - now 17 games unbeaten. (27.09)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Back to winning ways midweek, can Enzo Maresca's Chelsea overcome Brighton here and claim three Premier League points for the first time since August's 2-0 win over Fulham? (27.09)

programme.title: SNF: N. Forest v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest host Regis Le Bris' Sunderland at the City Ground on a Saturday Night Football doubleheader. Forest marked their European return midweek with a 2-2 draw to Betis. (27.09)

programme.title: SNF: Spurs v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: Spurs and Wolves round out Saturday Night Football in north London. For Wolves, it's five Premier League defeats on the spin as Vitor Pereira's side look to ignite their season. (27.09)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: As Fulham arrive at Villa Park for a Super Sunday clash with Unai Emery's men, will Aston Villa finally clinch three Premier League points after a poor start to the campaign? (28.09)

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: After achieving EFL Cup wins midweek, all eyes turn to St James' Park this Super Sunday, as Newcastle host Arsenal. The Gunners' last win in the north-east came back in April 2023. (28.09)

programme.title: MNF: Everton v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Monday Night Football comes from the Hill Dickinson Stadium, where Everton boss David Moyes meets his former side West Ham United - now under the management of Nuno Espírito Santo. (29.09)

programme.title: Live British F1 GP: Practice 1
